rules.title: Shore Power Connection
rules.description: If connecting to external grid power, the electrical connection must use a weatherproof NEMA-rated locking receptacle (L14-30 or higher).

rules.title: Electrical Load Capacity
rules.description: Total connected electrical load must not exceed 200 amps for mobile units. Fixed establishments require a load calculation signed by a licensed electrician.

rules.title: Tenant Improvement Permit
rules.description: Any structural modification, plumbing change, or electrical alteration to an existing commercial space requires a Tenant Improvement (TI) permit. Review time: 4-8 weeks.

rules.title: ADA Compliance
rules.description: All customer-facing establishments must comply with ADA accessibility standards: 36-inch doorways, accessible restrooms, ramp access (max 1:12 slope).

rules.title: Plumbing Requirements
rules.description: Commercial kitchens require a 3-compartment sink, separate handwash sink, and grease interceptor connected to the sanitary sewer.

rules.title: HVAC Ventilation
rules.description: Commercial food preparation areas require mechanical ventilation with make-up air supply equal to at least 80% of exhaust volume.

rules.title: Signage Mounting
rules.description: Externally mounted signs exceeding 6 sq ft or 20 lbs require a Sign Installation Permit and structural engineering review.
